title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
scenario: Notification and Device Alert toggle states in App Settings > General > Notifications persist after closing and reopening the app
steps: Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications
Toggle some Notification toggles ON and some OFF
Close the Notifications tab and reopen it
Verify the selected toggle states persist
Close and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate again to App Settings → General → Notifications
Verify the selected toggle states persist
Set all Notification toggles to ON
Close and reopen the Notifications tab, then close and reopen the app
Set all Notification toggles to OFF
Close and reopen the Notifications tab, then close and reopen the app
expected: All Notification and Device Alert toggle states persist correctly after closing/reopening the tab and after closing/reopening the app. Toggles set ON remain ON, toggles set OFF remain OFF.
